Cultural.title: Venue Setup & Stage Decoration
Cultural.description: Arrange stage, seating, traditional decor, and lighting.

Cultural.title: Artist & Performer Logistics
Cultural.description: Confirm green room, hospitality, and performance sequence.

Cultural.title: AV Sound & Lighting Test
Cultural.description: Sound check mics, speakers, and stage lights with vendor.

Cultural.title: Refreshments & Catering Ordering
Cultural.description: Finalize menu and confirm delivery time with food vendor.

Cultural.title: Post-Event Cleanup & Return Inventory
Cultural.description: Clear venue space and return borrowed equipment.

Sports.title: Ground & Equipment Readiness
Sports.description: Inspect sports ground, court markings, and equipment inventory.

Sports.title: Tournament Fixtures & Rules Sheet
Sports.description: Draft bracket schedule, rules document, and referee briefing.

Sports.title: First Aid & Hydration Station
Sports.description: Stock medical kits, ice packs, water dispensers, and energy drinks.

Sports.title: Trophies, Medals & Certificates
Sports.description: Procure awards and print winner certificates.

Social.title: Icebreaker Activities & Host Briefing
Social.description: Prepare icebreaker games, trivia questions, and MC script.

Social.title: Snacks & Beverage Counter Setup
Social.description: Setup food stalls, self-serve drinks, and seating pods.

Social.title: Playlist & Ambient Music Setup
Social.description: Setup speakers and curate background music playlist.

Gaming & Tech.title: LAN / High-Speed Wi-Fi Provisioning
Gaming & Tech.description: Ensure dedicated high-bandwidth network and ethernet switches.

Gaming & Tech.title: Console / PC & Monitor Station Setup
Gaming & Tech.description: Install gaming consoles, monitors, extension cords, and controllers.

Gaming & Tech.title: Leaderboard & Tournament Bracket Management
Gaming & Tech.description: Display live scores on projector and manage match progression.

Workshops & Seminars.title: Speaker Hospitality & Presentation Check
Workshops & Seminars.description: Test projector, clicker, slide deck, and welcome guest speaker.

Workshops & Seminars.title: Attendee Registration Desk Setup
Workshops & Seminars.description: Set up check-in desk, name tags, and welcome kits.

Workshops & Seminars.title: Participant Feedback Forms
Workshops & Seminars.description: Prepare QR code / feedback sheets for post-session rating.

Default.title: Event Space Reservation & Layout Setup
Default.description: Reserve common area and set up seating layout.

Default.title: Procurement & Vendor Confirmation
Default.description: Confirm required materials and vendor delivery dates.

Default.title: Resident Announcement & Reminder
Default.description: Send event invitation and schedule reminder broadcast.

Default.title: Post-Event Wrap-up & Feedback Collection
Default.description: Clean up venue and log event metrics.
